title: Factors Determining Software Project Success vs. Failure
description: A flowchart illustrating the key factors and decision points that lead to a project being deemed a success or a failure.
relationships: Positive factors (e.g., Clear Requirements) flow into and contribute to successful outcomes (e.g., Meets Business Objectives). Negative factors (e.g., Scope Creep) flow into and contribute to failure outcomes (e.g., Late & Over Budget). The outcomes collectively define the final project state as either a Success or a Failure.
